summary: Iteration 38 - Revenue Intelligence Module (Cross-Module Analytics + Yield Variance Benchmarking) PASSED. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Revenue Intelligence panel accessible from sidebar under 'Analytics & AI' section with all 4 tabs working correctly (Overview, Margin Recovery, Yield Variance, Channel Mix).
critical_code_review_comments: Cross-Module Dashboard aggregates data from 4 modules: Fix My Menu, Micro-Market, Mobile Preorder, Cafeteria
Yield Variance Benchmarking compares actual vs projected yields with industry benchmarks (Entree 32%, Appetizer 28%, etc.)
Recovery opportunities include 3 strategies per flagged item: price_optimize, micro_market_bundle, portion_resize
Snapshot/History endpoints allow historical yield variance tracking
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all tabs and content sections
All MongoDB collections properly queried with _id exclusion
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: menu_items (25 items with food_cost/sell_price), mm_kiosks (2), mo_lockers (2), cafeteria_transactions, yield_benchmarks. Snapshot created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified Revenue Intelligence module. Backend: /api/analytics/cross-module (unified KPIs, channel_mix, recovery_opportunities), /api/analytics/yield-variance (projected vs actual yields, worst/best performers, by_category, industry_benchmarks), /api/analytics/yield-variance/snapshot (POST creates historical record), /api/analytics/yield-variance/history (GET returns snapshots). Frontend: Revenue Intelligence panel has data-testid='revenue-intel-panel' with tabs ri-tab-overview, ri-tab-recovery, ri-tab-yield, ri-tab-channels. Tab content areas: ri-overview-tab, ri-recovery-tab, ri-yield-tab, ri-channels-tab. Panel accessible from sidebar under 'Analytics & AI' section (may need scrolling).
